title: Waingapu Heat Wave
lead: Waingapu is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.37. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Waingapu has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 10.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 61% and the wind speed is moderate at 15.7 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has no impact on Heating Degree Days (HDD) which is at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
